title: [Phase 1 / Task 1.1] Create ai_providers.py Skeleton
close_reason: Task 1.1 complete: ai_providers.py skeleton created. All public stubs present with type hints and docstrings. Import and py_compile verified.

title: AI-PROVIDER-001: Configurable AI Provider Layer
close_reason: Epic closed: Phase 1 / Task 1.1 skeleton delivered. Remaining phases tracked via dependent tasks.

title: [Phase 1 / Task 1.2] Implement Dataclasses
close_reason: Task 1.2 complete: ProviderDescriptor, ProviderProfile, ConfigureOptions dataclasses fully implemented with default values and doctests. ProviderDescriptor.base_url=None, requires_api_key=True defaults added. ProviderProfile.model=None, base_url=None defaults added. All three instantiation tests pass. __all__ export list added.

title: [Phase 2 / Task 2.1] Register configure Subparser in generate_documentation.py
close_reason: Task 2.1 complete: configure subparser registered in generate_documentation.py with all 7 flags (--list-providers, --list-profiles, --list-profiles-for-provider, --create-profile, --edit-profile, --delete-profile, --activate-profile). python generate_documentation.py configure -h prints help without error. Early-return dispatch calls configure_command(). No breaking changes to existing flags.

Task 1.3 complete: ensure_providers() fully implemented in ai_providers.py. Idempotent (_initialized guard). Loads .env via python-dotenv when present; logs warning (never raises) when .env is missing. Populates _api_key_store with all *_API_KEY env vars. _reset_for_tests() helper added for unit-test isolation. All smoke-test assertions pass.
title: [Phase 1 / Task 1.3] Implement ensure_providers() and .env Bootstrap
[Phase 1 / Task 1.4] Implement resolve_active_provider() and get_active_profile()
close_reason: Task 1.4 complete: resolve_active_provider() reads AI_ACTIVE_PROVIDER, returns ProviderDescriptor, raises ProviderNotConfiguredError if unset or unregistered. get_active_profile() reads AI_ACTIVE_PROFILE and <PREFIX>_API_KEY, returns ProviderProfile with raw key, raises ProfileNotFoundError if unset or key missing. Both call ensure_providers() internally. All smoke tests pass.

title: [Phase 3 / Task 3.1] Implement register_provider() Public API
close_reason: Task 3.1 complete: register_provider() implemented in ai_providers.py. Adds descriptor to _provider_registry; raises ProviderAlreadyRegisteredError on duplicate (force=True overrides). All smoke tests pass.

title: [Phase 3 / Task 3.2] Register Built-in Providers
close_reason: Task 3.2 complete: All 5 built-in providers registered via _register_builtin_providers() called from ensure_providers(). Ollama and LocalAI have requires_api_key=False with correct base_url. All smoke tests pass.

title: [Phase 2 / Task 2.2] Implement configure_command() Dispatch
close_reason: Task 2.2 complete: configure_command() checks all 7 flags in declaration order, delegates to correct functions, returns 0/1, launches wizard stub when no flags. parse_provider_profile_arg() implemented. All smoke tests pass.

title: [Phase 4 / Task 4.4] Create ai_providers.ts TypeScript Interop Module
close_reason: Task 4.4 complete: ai_providers.ts created with resolveActiveProvider(), getActiveProfile(), maskApiKey(), write-back via spawnSync. All structural checks pass.

title: [Phase 4 / Task 4.5] Route AI Commands Through Provider Abstraction
close_reason: Task 4.5 complete: generate_documentation.py updated with --generate flag, _resolve_ai_context() helper, and provider/profile routing via resolve_active_provider()/get_active_profile(). mask_api_key() implemented in ai_providers.py. get_active_profile() updated to support named profile key lookup (PREFIX_PROFILENAME_API_KEY then PREFIX_API_KEY fallback). DocumentGenerator.__init__ accepts provider/profile params. All AI commands route through provider abstraction with clear ProviderNotConfiguredError/ProfileNotFoundError messages instead of raw KeyError.

title: [Phase 5 / Task 5.3] Unit Tests — Provider Resolution and Interop
close_reason: Task 5.3 complete: tests/test_provider_resolution.py created with 11 pytest tests covering TC-RES-PY-01 through TC-RES-PY-11. tests/ai_providers.test.ts created as Jest spec for TC-RES-TS-01 through TC-RES-TS-04. All 11 Python tests pass (pytest-9.0.2).

title: [Phase 2 / Task 2.3] Implement provider_list_command()
close_reason: Task 2.3 complete: provider_list_command() implemented in ai_providers.py. Rich table with columns ID, Display Name, Status (active/inactive), Profile Count. Active provider row highlighted in bold green. No API keys visible in output. configure --list-providers works end-to-end. All 11 smoke tests pass.

title: [Phase 3 / Task 3.3] Implement mask_api_key() and Apply to All Output Boundaries
close_reason: Task 3.3 complete: mask_api_key() already implemented (returns sk-***...***). Now applied at ALL output boundaries: provider_status_command() fully implemented with Rich panel showing masked key; provider_list_command() shows no API keys (Profile Count only); no raw keys in any terminal or log output. provider_status_command() gracefully handles no-active-provider state with yellow warning panel. All 11 tests pass.

title: [Phase 2 / Task 2.4] Implement provider_create_command()
close_reason: Task 2.4 complete: provider_create_command() fully implemented in ai_providers.py. Interactive mode uses questionary.password for API key and questionary.text for optional model override. Non-interactive mode reads key from env vars (named-profile key then fallback). Writes only to .env via dotenv.set_key(). Confirms success with Rich panel showing masked API key. Error paths: invalid provider ID prints registered list; missing required key in non-interactive mode exits with clear error. All 11 existing tests pass.

title: [Phase 4 / Task 4.1] Add AI Providers Menu Entry to --gui Loop
close_reason: Task 4.1 complete: 'AI Providers' menu entry added to --gui main loop in generate_documentation.py. _run_gui_loop() implemented with questionary.select main menu (Generate Documentation / AI Providers / Exit). AI Providers selection calls provider_status_command() then shows sub-menu: 'Run guided setup' launches configure_command(ConfigureOptions()); 'Back' returns to main menu. --gui flag added to argparse with early-return dispatch. KeyboardInterrupt handled gracefully at both main menu and sub-menu levels. questionary availability guarded with HAS_QUESTIONARY. All 11 existing tests pass.
